title: Mini Sword PVP
description: This pack changes the texture of normal swords to a small sword texture Useful for PvP
body:
![Mini Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7e1cba473ad6cf2c54685681421a4d6b424e5b6.png)
This texture pack replaces all original Minecraft swords with smaller versions.

Perfect for PvP and combat players who prefer a cleaner screen and better visibility.
# 

![In Hand And On Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5946a4ab4965489526565b8c0397e02add78cd6f.jpeg)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mini-sword-pvp)

# 
 -  Wooden Sword
-  Stone Sword
-  Iron Sword
-  Golden Sword
-  Diamond Sword
-  Netherite Sword
-  Copper Sword
#
